MOTION For Order To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties William Duty, et al.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion for order to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial is granted. No opposition filed. Cases numbered 274845 and 275851 are consolidated. Henceforth all papers shall be filed under the lead case no. 274845. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported = (503/TLJ)
